description: docx2txt is a pure python based utility to extract text from .docx files.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/docx2txt && python3 docx2txt.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/docx2txt && python3 docx2txt.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/docx2txt && python3 docx2txt.py --help`. Extract text from .docx files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: Extract text from .docx files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Extract text from .docx files.

name: docx2txt

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
